name: Yandex Cloud
description: Russian public cloud platform with compute, storage, ML (YandexGPT), and 60+ managed services accessible via API.

seo.title: Yandex Cloud — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Yandex Cloud: Russian public cloud platform with compute, storage, ML (YandexGPT), and 60+ managed services accessible via API.

when_to_use: Russian public cloud with compute, storage, and ML services
YandexGPT-powered AI APIs for Russian-language applications
Managed Kubernetes and serverless functions on Yandex Cloud
Data residency in Russia for regulatory compliance workloads
Object storage and CDN for Russian internet companies

pros: Full IaaS plus 60+ managed services via API
Strong performance in Russia and CIS regions
cons: Smaller ecosystem than AWS, GCP, or Azure
review.verdict: Fully featured Russian hyperscaler, only suitable if your business and customers operate primarily in Russia/CIS.
review.best_for: Russian and CIS-focused businesses needing local cloud with ML capabilities
review.not_for: Global startups with Western investors or sanctions compliance concerns
